title: phpdup configuration
description: Schema for phpdup.json. The phpdup CLI runs equivalent checks at load time via Phpdup\Cli\ConfigLoader::validate() and surfaces field-path errors before any analysis begins. Defaults below match Phpdup\Cli\Config.

paths.description: Source roots to scan. When this key is absent or empty, paths must come from the CLI args.

exclude.description: Glob patterns excluded from the scan. ** matches recursively.

min_block_size.description: Minimum AST node count for a block to be considered. Must be <= max_block_size; the cross-field check is enforced at load time.

max_block_size.description: Maximum AST node count for a block. Must be >= min_block_size. Blocks above this are dropped before fingerprinting.

normalization_mode.description: strict = variable-rename tolerant only. default = also collapse literal values. aggressive = also collapse method, property, and class names.

similarity_threshold.description: Jaccard threshold for the near-duplicate clustering phase. Below this, the type-3 containment fallback may still apply when optional_blocks.enabled is true.

tree_threshold.description: APTED tree-edit-distance similarity threshold applied to candidates that passed the Jaccard filter.

min_cluster_impact.description: Minimum cluster impact (approximately the count of duplicated lines) required for a cluster to appear in the report. Quiets output without changing clustering.

max_df.description: Maximum document-frequency for an n-gram before it is treated as boilerplate and dropped from candidate-pair generation. 0.01 suits real codebases; bump to ~0.5 for tiny fixtures where every n-gram is 'common' by ratio.

ngram_size.description: Token-level n-gram length used for fingerprinting and Jaccard similarity.

cache_dir.description: Directory used for the AST cache and per-file index snapshots.

parallelism.description: auto = detect CPU count and parallelize when worth it. off = run serially. manual = honor the workers field literally.

workers.description: Worker count for parallel preprocess + pair scoring. 0 = auto-detect from nproc / /proc/cpuinfo. 1 = serial. Higher is explicit.

incremental.description: Reuse per-file block snapshots from the IndexStore when the source hash, parser version, and config key all match. Disable for benchmarks or paranoid runs.

lazy_ast.description: Drop each block's original AST after fingerprinting; reload on demand inside the anti-unifier via BlockAstLoader. Disable for max speed when RAM is plentiful.

kinds.description: Block kinds to extract. Empty list (or omitted) means accept all kinds. Equivalent to --kinds on the CLI.

sort.description: Cluster sort spec — KEY[:DIRECTION]. Keys: impact, members, block-size, lines, similarity, confidence, name, file, id. Aliases: size/count → members; block_size → block-size. Direction defaults to desc; a leading '-' forces desc, '+' forces asc. Equivalent to --sort on the CLI.

optional_blocks.description: Tunables for type-3 / 'optional segment' clone detection — clusters where some members include extra statements not present in others, rendered as default-false bool $include* parameters in the suggested abstraction.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false the clusterer reverts to Jaccard-only and AntiUnifier falls back to whole-array subtree holes for divergent stmt arrays.

containment.description: ContainmentSimilarity threshold for the near-subset fallback used when Jaccard rejects a candidate pair. Higher = stricter.

min_overlap.description: Minimum size ratio (smaller bag mass / larger bag mass) for a near-subset pair to be kept. Prevents pairing a 1-line block with a 100-line one.

max_per_cluster.description: Cap on optional_block holes per cluster before AntiUnifier falls back to a single whole-array hole — guards against pathological seven-boolean signatures.

min_segment_length.description: Minimum stmt-array gap length (in raw stmts) to promote into an optional_block hole. Avoids noisy tiny mismatches.

report.description: File-output destinations. Equivalent to --html / --json on the CLI; the SARIF, GitLab SAST, diff, patch, and Checkstyle outputs are CLI-only.

html.description: Directory to write the interactive HTML report into.

json.description: Path to write the structured JSON report to.

db_aware.description: ORM-/DB-aware semantic deduplication (option 1 of docs/plans/orm-db-semantic-dedup.md). When true, the Normalizer runs DbOpCanonicalizer as a pre-pass: recognised database calls across Eloquent, Doctrine, query builders, PDO, mysqli, pg_*, and raw SQL strings rewrite to canonical __DB_<OP>__("table") tokens so equivalent ORM and raw-SQL variants of the same operation cluster together. Off by default — enabling it broadens clustering but raises the false-positive ceiling, so it's an explicit opt-in. CLI: --db-aware.

trinity_collapse.description: Trinity-collapse (option 2 of docs/plans/orm-db-semantic-dedup.md). When true, the Normalizer runs TrinityCollapser as a pre-pass that detects the canonical CRUD trinity (read → mutate → save) and rewrites the three-statement sequence as a single __DB_UPSERT__("entity") synthetic call. Composes with db_aware. Off by default. CLI: --trinity-collapse.

scorer.description: Scoring tier set (option 5 of docs/plans/orm-db-semantic-dedup.md — clusterer wiring). 'default' = stock AST-tier scoring (Jaccard + TED + containment). 'ir' = also enable the IR-tier fallback after AST tiers reject: lift both blocks to canonical IR (Phpdup\Ir\IrLifter) and Jaccard their token bags. Pairs at or above ir_threshold form edges. CLI: --scorer.

ir_threshold.description: Multiset-Jaccard threshold for the option-5 IR tier. Only consulted when scorer=ir. CLI: --ir-threshold.

ml_pair_url.description: External pair-similarity ML sidecar URL (option 6 of docs/plans/orm-db-semantic-dedup.md — clusterer wiring). Empty (the default) disables the tier. When set, the very last clustering tier — POSTs a PairFeatures vector to <URL>/score-pair; pairs at or above ml_pair_threshold form edges. http(s) only; SSRF-hardened (rejects file:// / gopher:// / 0.0.0.0). Returns null on transport failure so unavailability never breaks the run. CLI: --ml-pair-url.

ml_pair_threshold.description: Similarity threshold for the option-6 ML pair tier. Only consulted when ml_pair_url is set. CLI: --ml-pair-threshold.

db_symbols.description: User-extensible DB symbol equivalence registry (option 4 of docs/plans/orm-db-semantic-dedup.md). Custom method/function name → canonical-op mappings merged on top of the stock DbOpRegistry entries. Lower-cased keys; values are one of db.read | db.write | db.delete | db.execute | db.query. Profiles ship symbol packs (db-aware-laravel, db-aware-doctrine, db-aware-cake) that can be loaded via --profile.

methods.description: Method-name → canonical-op map. Matches against StaticCall, MethodCall, and NullsafeMethodCall names regardless of receiver. Lower-cased keys.

functions.description: Function-name → canonical-op map. Matches against FuncCall names. Lower-cased keys.

low_memory.description: Reduce memory footprint: use CompactNgramBag (32-bit fingerprint) and CanonicalNodePool interning. CLI: --low-memory.

fail_on_impact.description: CI gate: exit code 3 when total cluster impact exceeds this value. 0 = disabled. CLI: --fail-on-impact.

max_clusters.description: CI gate: exit code 3 when cluster count exceeds this value. 0 = disabled. CLI: --max-clusters.
